headline: 3 Cash-Producing Stocks We Approach with Caution
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.

headline: $1000 Invested In Block 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
summary:
Block (NYSE:XYZ) has outperformed the market over the past 10 years by 9.83% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 22.98%. Currently, Block has a market capitalization of $47.56 billion. 
Buying
